title: Strange Seele logo and Spectrum Emission Analysis
display_title: Strange Seele logo and Spectrum Emission Analysis
wikitext:
[]: Strange Seele logo and Spectrum Emission Analysis             Quote Post by BlackKnight » Wed Mar 22, 2017 2:12 pm I was watching Evangelion episode 23 yesterday and I noticed something I hadn't before. At approximately 19 minutes 50 seconds, there is an odd looking Seele logo at the bottom of the screen. The patterns reminded me of a spectrum graph. So I recreated the logo by tracing it. Next, I removed the triangle. Then I superimposed the patterns over a diagram of the visible spectrum and stretched them to fit the width of the diagram. These patterns don't mean much to me, but I was wondering if anyone here had any thoughts on this.

[]: Re: Strange Seele logo and Spectrum Emission Analysis             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 22, 2017 2:25 pm I'd assumed that the bars represented chromosome ideograms , given the nature of the work at the "Artificial Evolution Laboratory".

[]: Re: Strange Seele logo and Spectrum Emission Analysis             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Mar 22, 2017 2:55 pm The two come together at one point Otherwise the bands are too wide to represent absorption spectra, and too irregular in size to be any sort of simple bar code -- they're not even like the possible signal in the binary soup here

[]: Re: Strange Seele logo and Spectrum Emission Analysis             Quote Post by DawkingsDD » Wed Apr 19, 2017 10:34 pm You really may be on to something, alternative images of the seele logo have the spectrum colors inside as well Each of the 7 eyes seems to have all a distinctly different pattern, my assumption is it somehow represents each of the 7 chairmen of Seele uniquely .

[]: Re: Strange Seele logo and Spectrum Emission Analysis             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 20, 2017 2:00 am But there aren't seven Seele chairmen... The committee has five members. (Six if you count Gendo.) The inner circle of Seele has 12 members.

[]: Re: Strange Seele logo and Spectrum Emission Analysis             Quote Post by Eraclito999 » Tue May 30, 2023 1:54 pm i'm a molecular biologist, they represents exons and introns, genes are drawn like this. with each block meaning a piece of dna code. in splicing blocks rearranges to give different products from a single transcript. you can see also the 4 amino bases that constitutes the dna A C G T. in sequencing this bases are obtained scanning dna molecules by various means. NGS are the most advanced sequencing systems to scan dna.

[]: Re: Strange Seele logo and Spectrum Emission Analysis             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue May 30, 2023 4:47 pm Now that's a good thread necro if I've ever seen one. Thanks for your insight! Always good to see a professional shedding some light on obscure topics. As a followup, does the sequence in particular mean anything to you? Is there some hidden lore hint in here, or is this just generic noise/a lorem ipsum type of thing
